channel.title: big data on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in big data on Frank Huang

item.title: Understanding how yarn scheduler works and parameters
item.description: YARN(Yet Another Resource Negotiator) which is the second generation of mapreduce implementation. YARN component: Resource manager (Scheduler) Node manager Application master (communication between node manager and resource manager) Question: since application master is considered not an trustworthy service(https://mapr.com/docs/home/MapROverview/c_application_master.html), how come it can pass the security token from the resource manager to the node manager to adjust the container resources? Different types of yarn scheduling strategy FIFO Capacity schedualer Fair schedualer Roles in yarn Node manager Resource manager Container is a subset of resources which perform one or many tasks.
